titles.text: Kaizou Choujin Schbibinman 3: Ikai no Princess
改造町人シュビビンマン 3 異界のプリンセス

descriptions.text: Tasuke and Kyapiko are spending a nice relaxing day at the beach, when suddenly a huge spaceship appears overhead! This can only mean one thing... another invasion! Tasuke and Kyapiko suit up and set out to stop it... or is it all just a gross misunderstanding?
